They arrived on schedule, completed the job in two days and left everything neat and tidy when they were done. Roof looks great, got our specified shingles and colour, a job well done, thanks Chance.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laurence Shine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFeeSs8b5uJ3_qkfumsaOECAiydtQtiQhLQq8s0E1iXlZrgBoB=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Check out Gentlemen’s Roofing First!!

Because we have a heritage home that has to meet certain criteria to maintain its status, we needed someone who could replace our roof properly. Our home is also significantly taller and has many pitches compared to the usual home in the neighborhood, which made the work more complicated.

Chance and his crew were highly recommended by a family friend who is also in the roofing business.

Not only was the work done really well (even our neighbours commented on the roof) and in a timely fashion (2-3 days), but the cost was significantly less than what the other roofers estimated (which is probably, in part, because Chance doesn’t add on gimmicks like drone videos or computerized simulation of your roof).

Most of all, these guys are honest and keep their word! Chance underestimated the cost of the replacement due to the need for metal edges on the roof, but Chance did NOT add these additional charges to his original estimate because he sticks to his original quote!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Renee Stanton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7bVLRNMjqOIXTmUm8q32-E4F_PPaFDJidRWFyDL-cWjzkcpj6=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t thank Chance and his team enough for their incredible job. Chance was a true professional & he and his team worked diligently in the snow to complete our 6000 square foot roof in 2.5 weeks! Their pricing beat the competition but most importantly their craftsmanship was exceptional. They left the area spotless & Chance was always there to answer any question and is just a really nice guy. It’s nice to see that the owner of the company takes pride in his work and also works on site.
Thank you Chance!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID-ss3i-wE&fid=0x0:0x3a95ccb52f86e471"],"When":"2022-11-26"},{"Name":"Mike Krause","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ_yztmtMdqY_3FjywdcIpgIInFL8oltmBswEm4l8V7QU49SQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Called about a leak, and Chance came the next day. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Mary Ann Gill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvyFfVYMuVchjj5-4IBJh3yexknefEKo45aITKjQaLNeU8Qcbp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the GO TO company everyone needs to know about !!! We first used Archer 3 years ago when our skylight seals failed.  This company was 40% less and available to do the work within days.  They showed up,  billed what they said they would and the job done was without mess and zero issues.  Fast forward to today.  We had a serious roof leak on a new roof that was done on a different home We own.  Our insurance would not cover the repairs due to an inspection that discovered the company that did it,  did not do around the flashings and vents correctly, causing the failures that caused the leak. 3 company's were called to provide quotes and timeline for completion.  Archer provided the middle price quote,  but when he came to do the quote,  he was the clearest on how to fix it and why.  The work was done on time and the bill was as quoted.  Very impressed. Highly recommend!!!! Added bonus,  a stone from the exterior of our chimney had come off, we asked if he could come back to attach it,  he did and refused to take payment for that extra trip and time completing this.\nSo impressed !!!!\nGive them a call to bid your project !!! You'll be impressed !!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6VszTe_QWOc8qOHtpxsGW\u0026fid=0x0:0xd539085dbc799fb9"],"When":"2025-6-17"},{"Name":"Shirley Huybers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUtwgucm6-uB_TWlO_xMmZFmWsGAG4CsczJ_52lSD_ysr9hpw7=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"On windy days, I could hear the wind blowing through my skylight so I called Archer Roofing to see if they could come and take a look at it.  Pawel came and was really nice to deal with.  He explained in terms I could understand as to what the problem might be.  He didn't try and upsell me on getting a new skylight, in fact he told me that I could probably get a few more years out of the one I had.  He said that he'd probably only have to replace some flashing and a gasket to seal it better, but he would know better once he got the skylight off.  I asked him to give me a quote on replacing the skylight as well as repairing the one I have.  When I received both quotes I decided to go with a new skylight.  When the job was completed, I noticed that all the cardboard and garbage from the job was gone.  He also checked out the rest of my roof and said that it looked good.  I found that dealing with Archer Roofing was a great experience.  Pawel is very pleasant, polite and very knowledgable at his job. I also liked that he takes the time to explain exactly what he is going to do.  I would highly recommend Pawel and Archer Roofing to anyone who is looking to repair their roof or skylights etc.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angela Yurich","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPh3mLE2sqLkVDcohbpOpLwrHKhESg4Ef2JAAhl-j7_0nWdgc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I needed a few things done on my roof. Pawel came out immediately and looked at the roof; confirmed nothing was done and then got to work. I decided I wanted a new skylight too!  He was extremely caring; (Im in a seniors community) his price was super fair and he did not try to upsell me stuff I did not need. I highly recommend Pawel from Archer roofing!!!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MLB Great White North","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUgzNGUJpnSRhJi0yjUcHL3THXbw4uoqO6p4mnEuxQkzE5ZLP8H=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pawel, of \"Archer Roofing\" was very helpful and professional, always asking question to get the job done the way the homeowner wanted. Pinnacle provided us with a clear quote, with details about options that were available.  When we chose to proceed, they communicated clearly about timelines and expectations. We highly recommend him and are also going to hire him for the house we just bought. Thank- you David, your our new friend.
Claire & Bob Stone","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"g g","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKzpwG-GVwePuVsxNZ7z-VBwVQ_tZFPvGhFSQJ6CXAoWWRmzQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired Lakeview Roof Service to repair some shingles that had buckled on the roof of the garage in our 14 year old home, and to examine possible water ingress in one corner of the garage ceiling.  David inspected the entire roof and advised that the buckled shingles had been improperly installed originally.  He located several other areas on our roof that had similar issues and provided photos prior to commencing work, and subsequent to completing the repairs.  He determined that there had been no water leaking into the garage, however, he remedied a patch of mold at the site and re-painted that section of the ceiling.  David also installed rainwater diverters to channel water away from the fascia and into the gutters, to prevent any wood rot in the fascia.  His service was professional, thorough and courteous.  We highly recommend David and his firm.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lloyd McClelland","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJk5xTxKL3vjw9nAP0_YZgaVU_-Sc5WUBz9qIzYGVOg7AmeEg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our strata hired Dave from Lakeview Roof Service to help us fix a serious issue in our attics that had not been fixed properly by 2 previous companies. We highly recommend this company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"W R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIBggtrQkjRnF4gf6ZueFtZl9HXquv7PxXSELphsmf7GUBqrA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I obtained multiple estimates for roof repairs including several skylight replacements. He was super to deal with. Very professional. He communicated the issues he felt needed attention in detail and gave us a quote and timeline on repairs. We were very impressed with the quality of his service and work. We asked him to come back to put a roof on our pergola!! We do love the improvement to our backyard space!! Highly recommend!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"GDS 1246","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqYJIEedfO-AgdWdeL1k5vmUYkpz7EZs1X-syOg7E5YPxLgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired David @ Lakeview Roofing to do some minor repairs to our roof on a 15 year old house we bought a few months ago. The original roofer neglected to put rain diverters in the roof system and as a result there was some damage to some of the ends of the fascia boards.

From the first call to the completion, David was very professional, friendly and polite. It is obvious he is very knowledgeable about his trade and about roof systems. He returned calls, text messages and emails quickly. He showed up when he said he was going to,  and even called one day well before the time he was to show up to advise he would be a bit late and this was only because of Bridge traffic!!!! This quality of service unfortunately is pretty much non existent nowadays in the trades in Kelowna. And..........his price was good too.

Finding trades in Kelowna with this level of service and work is rare as a lot of trades that we have found since moving here don't even bother responding to emails or phone calls.

I have absolutely no hesitation at all in highly recommending David and his company Lakeview roofing for all your roofing needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cory Hnatiuk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJKWLDCOMZWLKLInDxYX509B32rD7mFiHV7GwdVdNgTLHWY5g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Storm came through and water was leaking from our covered patio. Called Lakeview and Dave was able to get out right away, found the leak and gave me an estimate right then. He also suggested some other things that may need repairs down the road. I approved  on the spot and Dave had it completed the same day.
Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""}]

They did a good job but the only two issues I had: 1) Communication leading up to the appointment. I didn't receive a confirmation so I really wasn't sure if they were coming. So, I reached out to confirm. 2) The gutter on one side of my house was not cleaned. How can I tell? There was a plant growing that was there before and after the gutter cleaning. However, I called them and they came to clean it then took pictures to show me the evidence of the cleaning. Overall, very good and the most competitive per square inch price for roof cleaning.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCxrevL3cFvh4aP3B8Q3Tdr&fid=0x0:0x45646945a4fb5a26"],"When":"2025-10-15"},{"Name":"Cayla Stiles-Clark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKvhd8dT-j3vDJygLh9Cndn3MuaOQLuFzW7d8ovI7fcoEV8vYB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Came across OK Roof Revival at a local home show in February after experiencing a roof leak (that got worse shortly after the initial interaction). They then came to my house a few weeks later and did a drone over with photos. They presented me with a detail account of my roof's condition and gave me affordable options.

It did then take several weeks for someone to come to the island to do the in person inspection, but that was very reasonable. They were able to schedule my home shortly afterwards for the repair and rejuvenation.

My only issues were with communications and issues with the financing after the repair. After the initial presentation, I kept having to follow up to get a set answer.

And then communications broke down when they had to reschedule the repair (was supposed to a Thursday and rescheduled to Sunday afternoon) I was ok with the reschedule after I rearranged my schedule for the Sunday. Then I received multiple appointment emails the day before (Saturday) kept changing the time on Sunday. While this was going on, a worker showed up on the Saturday to stage the day before the repair was scheduled and we were not home. We really didn't know what was going on. A call later, from Cameron, resolved the confusion.

The repair itself was well done as well as the rejuvenation. They did a beautiful job on my roof. It looks fantastic. They supplied before, during and after pictures.

It did take a few days to get the final invoice cleared up as the wrong financing was set up but it was fixed by their office within a week of the completion of the repair.

All in all, it was a good experience and I would still recommend them over any local roofing company. (and I did have 2 other roofers look at my roof who were useless).

Thank you OK Roof Revival for all that you have done.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKOr9riNncPcDA&fid=0x0:0x45646945a4fb5a26"],"When":"2025-6-3"},{"Name":"Wes Winger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI95cV-vMjfVwkB1PwapDfOjHHnakKsYX_LrO8asM75a2fM2A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had a great initial meeting/consultation with the owner. I would deal with Cameron again!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"P Hewko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZ-UHhSNZ5NjBK6SzQjmUThyiZAISXWDNzw_yMKBx9PMgilw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Found a leak sunday night, called OK Roof Revival monday morning, they came out same day, flew a drone over my house, assesed the issue, came out tuesday with materials and made the necessary repairs. Jen","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDp_v_76QE&fid=0x0:0x8233eff8e683ad72"],"When":"2023-8-23"},{"Name":"wayne larsson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhEIdm6pQ5bTLt1SO1R69TIQK75uGXFw8vqq33P5BPVPsWqg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were thinking of replacing our roof.  Trevor came out and showed us what needed to be done now to extend the life of our roof.  We decided to install vents.  Trevor booked us in and was very quick to come do the install.
We really appreciate the honesty without the over selling.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caeleen Kennedy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXw5OAnWymawliA1TrckT0bhFTZg4QQ_ZyNZSFGqvgWiFT9nrE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our home sustained damage from a powerful windstorm and I called TI Roof Rescue to look over our roof for any potential damage. To my surprise, they were able to provide a quote and replace a strip of missing roof shingles on the roof of my home on the very same day. We were provided a very reasonable rate for their labour and supplies. They also provided photos of the work that was done and even fixed up our soffits, temporarily, since they "aren't soffit experts". I greatly appreciated that they took extra time out of their busy day to assess and temporatily fix damage to my soffits. I would highly recommend TI Roof Rescue if you are in need of any roof repairs and I would utilize them again if ever we require future work on our home. Trevor and his team were pleasant, personable, and professional.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDGyvbSyAE&fid=0x0:0x8233eff8e683ad72"],"When":"2021-11-24"},{"Name":"Steph Pullen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLHfZr6ws3PcglDO1cdnpO4a9voUtQHn1Z6DLcvElnDjh80Kg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a leak in the house. Called Roof Rescue and Trevor was very knowledgeable and honest. He came out to our house in a timely manner. He found a few issues that could be contributing to our problem and rectified the issues. He was very excellent at explaining and making suggestions. He did not try to push costly repairs or unnecessary work. Would 100% use Trevor @ Roof Rescue again!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenni Gregg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlSrxqdZ4SKIDHxhxbucsDm6sUAQ9vXmAWagiu2YzAikJXCX9xyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can't recommend Roof Rescue enough!!

After a weekend of heavy rain, I discovered a leak in my roof. The restoration crew couldn’t go up there, so a friend recommended I call Roof Rescue, and I’m so glad I did!

Trevor came by quickly, assessed the damage, and had great solutions ready to go. Within just a couple of hours, my roof was not only fixed, but honestly better than it was before. He explained everything in a clear, down-to-earth way and suggested a few simple ventilation upgrades.

He took plenty of photos to walk me through what he was doing, gave me tips on what to watch for over the next few years, and was just incredibly friendly and easy to work with. I really felt looked after.  And, I swear I could already feel the temperature difference on my upper floor within hours.

Trevor and the team at Roof Rescue are knowledgeable, professional, and genuinely care about the work they do. I highly recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Ginny Sellars","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5bLqke8PWOjP6yvpz8TXLyXpWvDy2xRlar95irh9sb-4gRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I called Madge Custom Roofing in an emergency. Dale was a great communicator, and employed skilled teams for removal of shakes, plywood prep, and metal install. Dale gave prompt estimates and also came out immediately, twice.  He charged a modest price especially considering that this was a service call and took up his time with travel for a small job.  He was courteous and responsive throughout. I intend to use Dale for my future larger roofing needs.   I would recommend him!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ken Green","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIwXNXgkoOb2ydogPFgOPMH95-vLS5KmsH3kOrdNAP40sC99g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Madge replaced and installed our roof about 10 years ago. I love how I can enjoy our lovely countryside view. Our yard feels bigger. My landscaper built it easily. He was able to cut down a panel easily for a section that needed to be a custom size for the turn in the fence. You will not be disappointed with their products. Delivery was 2 months for us, but if you plan for it, it’s worth the wait. I appreciate that it ships direct and is included in the price. We have 2 dogs and it holds well even when they jump up to bark at the neighbors dog or deer.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtRTKDc5IfnY6zQWy0oyvG&fid=0x0:0xf546eebe5d088a54"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Rosie Breault","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKMQjfOLySYnH1gFTB3yrxyLBdyHUUgtD-yi__QKvzcTLu9NQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An incredibly sexy looking fence! I don't think I will ever have to replace my fence again as long as I live.  Leo & the BarrierBoss Team go the extra mile.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBkXAYHSAupoCxV6ZBlxRVr&fid=0x0:0xf546eebe5d088a54"],"When":"2026-1-29"},{"Name":"Ryan McRae","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJrZL0_R4kJ3CBIIHEdw6LMSCueXecF055_MHv9Z-GqD4oQS30=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are really glad we chose BarrierBoss for our fencing. The ordering process on the website was easy and everything was clearly explained, which made it simple to get exactly what we needed for our property in Calgary. The black metal fence looks amazing. It is clean, modern, and feels very solid. It completely changed the look of our yard and we have already had a few neighbours comment on how great it looks.

Shipping did take a few weeks, but we were aware of that ahead of time and it was well worth the wait. Everything arrived in great condition and the quality really shows. Our local contractor also mentioned how nice the system was to install and how well everything fit together.

Overall, we could not be happier with the result and would absolutely recommend BarrierBoss to anyone looking for a high quality metal fence.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julian Vicente","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQRMgwLSn2C6qv4J7dsrix-hMxcRTi7s-ojl9qZqSw_OZpKBS6jA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Barrier Boss, they are true professionals.  Leo and team were a pleasure to deal with.  The communication was great & everything purchased was top quality.  I replaced our old, dried out cedar fence using 6x6 pressure treated posts and black corrugated panels.  It was quite the project to tackle on my own but worth all the effort.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAFKb5776SQLUT60MAbvLKa&fid=0x0:0xf546eebe5d088a54"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Scott Thares","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIMd9LD87Vu5HFT-vYbqrpuSAzGqeejeL2tq3ybBVuG0Db3=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The wait was worth it! seldom does a product exceed expectations, this one did. From the delivery to the overall satisfaction of this amazing product I could not be happier. If your not in a huge hurray do yourself a favor and look into this.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQzt18S1B97kVsuN0fJtIx&fid=0x0:0xf546eebe5d088a54"],"When":"2025-11-12"},{"Name":"John Wood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4D65ncKhCLMbtlpVj-bfJftLyt-VmZiHWnIHpZ-ND8i5fsg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"In searching for a metal fence supplier that could supply colours other than black, white and natural, I contacted BarrierBoss about getting a medium brown colour.  They said they had just added "coffee" as a colour choice.  I was very impressed with their design and process for manufacturing of the panels,  so I put in an order for 103 feet of back fence and 80 feet of side fence.

During the manufacturing process, they ran into a supply problem (US supplier, tariffs, transportation delay) with the brown metal material.  They found an alternative supply in Alberta, which offered the bonus of having a second colour on the other side.  So, we ended up with “coffee” for the outside colour, and “buckskin” for the inside colour.

The order, including all posts and bases for each section, was securely shipped on a dedicated truck and trailer.  Their driver was very cooperative in scheduling and assisting with unloading and storage onsite.

The panels were supplied exactly as ordered, and very easy to install securely.  The finished result is an impressive zero-maintenance fence we will enjoy and be proud of for many years.  Thank you BarrierBoss for a superb product.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOGX_KzchKqWLg&fid=0x0:0xf546eebe5d088a54"],"When":"2025-5-20"},{"Name":"Dennis McRae","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL59D1u_7uIr5_uDRS3IZjONqNkqTVVGfGrKmXQWebDdg-o9w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We installed BarrierBoss hog wire fencing on our property and could not be happier with the result. The panels are solid, clean, and well made, and the finished fence looks both modern and timeless. It feels sturdy without blocking views, which was exactly what we wanted. Customer service was easy to work with and answered our questions quickly, especially around sizing and installation. You can tell this is not a generic big box product. The quality really stands out, and we have already had multiple people ask where the fence came from.","Images":null,"When":""}]
